notes: Nam Phái and Trung Châu are never merged into a generic rule without evidence.
Trung Châu remains isolated on its own V0.2 pipeline; this pack does not propose changing it.

namPhai.policy: Domain anchors resolve via natal palace name matched to the annual head rotation (annual-palace-name coordinate).

trungChau.policy: Uses annual 'trùng bài' labels directly (annual-palace-name coordinate), via a separate V0.2 resolver.
trungChau.runtimeCompatibility: out of scope for this pack; documented for contrast only

namPhai.policy: annualHeadPalace / isLuuNienDaiVan flag identifies the annual Mệnh-equivalent head for the year.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: matches production; annualHeadMoveSensitivityRate = 1.0 in this audit (every head move changes at least one axis > 0.5)

trungChau.policy: Annual Mệnh via separate V0.2 focus resolution.

namPhai.policy: Tiểu Hạn is a general annual frame in Nam Phái school-manual doctrine; V0.8 still wires it as a cooperating-weight palace input only into health (0.2) as an engineering simplification.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: production mapping unchanged; doctrine now records general-frame scope

namPhai.policy: V0.8 does not use a TP4C (Tứ Phương Chính Chiếu) frame; scoring is purely palace-weighted, not frame/aspect-based. TP4C/frame evidence collection is a V0.2-only concept (collect-domain-frames.ts) not used by the V0.8 formula.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: matches production — nam-phai-v08/score-domain.ts has no frame/aspect concept

trungChau.policy: V0.2 uses TP4C frames (focus/opposite/trine) as the core evidence-collection mechanism.
trungChau.runtimeCompatibility: out of scope; documented for contrast only

namPhai.policy: Annual Tứ Hóa are temporally distinct identities from natal/decadal Tứ Hóa; only annual-scoped rules match them.
Natal/fixed stars in a palace are read together with annual Lưu động when evaluating hạn; V0.8 numeric participation retained without reweight in this PR.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: matches production; qualitative policy now source-backed

namPhai.policy: Tân Biên §4 explicitly lists nine annual Lưu động stars (including Thiên Mã). Calculation Core emits additional Lưu identities; only Lưu Thiên Mã from the twelve unreferenced set is candidate-eligible for numeric Annual Axes in this foundation.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: production registry unchanged; candidate shape SHAPE-AAV09-THIEN-MA-MOVEMENT authorized for evaluation

namPhai.policy: Dignity/miếu-hãm is conditional for natal mains and optional/conditional for annual auxiliaires; no numeric dignity multiplier authorized.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: matches production match-stars.ts dignityOk() binary gate; no multiplier added

namPhai.policy: Prominence multiplier only (×1.25), magnitude-scaling, never a positive point source, never creates direction from zero.
No annual Tuần/Triệt identity is constructed; unsupported, disabled in production registry.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: matches production — addVoidStars only constructs natal identities

namPhai.policy: Bác Sĩ cycle (incl. Đại Hao/Tiểu Hao/Phục Binh) is natal-only via addLuGroup; no annual identity constructed; unsupported, disabled in production registry.
namPhai.runtimeCompatibility: matches production — annual addLuGroup does not emit these identities

namPhai.policy: V0.8 domain-palace weights remain engineering hypotheses. Social/romance two-palace asymmetry is an acceptable engineering simplification without source-backed remapping.
